# PostSnail Markdown Editor Bundle Licenses

`vendor/postsnail-editor/editor.bundle.js` is generated from `src/editor/postsnailMarkdownEditor.js`
with esbuild. It vendors CodeMirror 6 and Lezer packages so the browser admin can run
without runtime CDN imports.

## Bundled Packages

| Package | Version | License | Copyright / Notice |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
